# System packages commonly needed for Azas ROS 2 + camera + STT review.
#
# Install explicitly on the robot PC after reviewing the target Ubuntu/ROS image.

python3-pip
python3-vcstool
python3-rosdep
python3-colcon-common-extensions
ros-humble-moveit
ros-humble-realsense2-camera
ros-humble-cv-bridge
ros-humble-tf-transformations
portaudio19-dev
